subcodes.first_line: O my two kind friends of Najafabad! Praise be to God, it hath been made a Bahá-abode since the dawning of the morn of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو یار مهربان من نجف آباد الحمد لله بها آباد است از بدایت طلوع صبح احدیت آن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
